current_judgment: degraded PDF detection and fallback evidence are now locked for customer-pack normalize without requiring any fallback parser to be installed.
core_evidence: PDF customer-pack normalize now stamps degraded/fallback metadata on draft records and canonical payloads.
Requested fallback backend `surya` no longer implies failure when no adapter is installed; normalize succeeds and records `backend_unavailable`.
Healthy PDF fixtures are not flagged as degraded.

next_action: If you want Surya to actually participate in normalize, the next packet is a dedicated adapter packet that binds the new fallback seam to a concrete Surya/Marker callable or remote endpoint without widening the detector contract.
